seoTitle: How to Create a Dashboard in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to build a custom dashboard in Freshdesk to keep the metrics that matter most to your team front and center.
intro: A well-built dashboard gives your team a quick pulse check on support performance the moment they log in. This guide walks through creating a new dashboard in Freshdesk.

steps.heading: Go to the dashboard section
steps.body: Open the analytics or dashboard area of Freshdesk from the main navigation.

steps.heading: Start a new dashboard
steps.body: Choose the option to create a new dashboard rather than editing an existing one.

steps.heading: Add widgets
steps.body: Select and add the widgets you want, such as ticket status breakdowns or agent performance summaries.

steps.heading: Arrange and save
steps.body: Arrange the widgets in a layout that makes sense for your team, then save the dashboard.

faq.question: Can I create multiple dashboards?
faq.answer: Yes, Freshdesk typically allows you to create several dashboards for different purposes or teams.

faq.question: Can I share a dashboard with my team?
faq.answer: Yes, dashboards can generally be shared so other agents or managers can view the same metrics.

faq.question: What widgets are available?
faq.answer: Common widgets include ticket volume, resolution time, agent performance, and satisfaction scores.

faq.question: Can I edit a dashboard after creating it?
faq.answer: Yes, you can go back and add, remove, or rearrange widgets at any time.
